requiredChecks.label: Lab fairness report linked
requiredChecks.summary: The forfeit-flip-fairness lab report (hash + snapshot root) is attached to the case.

requiredChecks.label: Provable-fairness invariants
requiredChecks.summary: Commitment-only peek, seed-hashlock (sha256(seed)==commit), and strictly increasing nonce all pass.

requiredChecks.label: Secret redaction
requiredChecks.summary: Peek surface and evidence reference no server seed, client seed, or signing material.

recommendedChecks.label: Badge ready
recommendedChecks.summary: Eligible for a public trust badge; badge-forfeit-flip-verified is issued and signed.

recommendedChecks.label: Settlement residual disclosed
recommendedChecks.summary: Fairness is fully trustless; settlement is bonded-cooperative + timeout-forfeit (HTLC-grade), not contract-grade forced payout — consensus cannot gate a payout on the game outcome.

reports.evidenceSummary: Forfeit Flip carries a passing two-sided commit-reveal fairness report with a commitment-only peek surface.
reports.reviewerNotes: Proves the fairness model and that the invariants are well-formed; the standalone verifier reproduces the coin-flip seed-leak contrast (100% vs ~50%).
reports.publicSummary: Provably-fair coin flip: outcome derives from H(serverSeed‖clientSeed‖nonce); either party can recompute it from public reveals.

requiredChecks.label: Lab fairness report linked
requiredChecks.summary: The forfeit-dice-fairness lab report (hash + snapshot root) is attached to the case.

requiredChecks.label: Provable-fairness invariants
requiredChecks.summary: Commitment-only peek, seed-hashlock, strictly increasing nonce, and unbiased [0,9999] roll band all pass.

requiredChecks.label: Secret redaction
requiredChecks.summary: Peek surface and evidence reference no server seed, client seed, or signing material.

recommendedChecks.label: Badge ready
recommendedChecks.summary: Eligible for a public trust badge; badge-forfeit-dice-verified is issued and signed.

recommendedChecks.label: Distribution uniformity
recommendedChecks.summary: The standalone verifier proves chi-square uniformity (df=9) with rejection sampling removing modulo bias.

recommendedChecks.label: Settlement residual disclosed
recommendedChecks.summary: Fairness is fully trustless; settlement is bonded-cooperative + timeout-forfeit (HTLC-grade), not contract-grade forced payout — consensus cannot gate a payout on the game outcome.

reports.evidenceSummary: Forfeit Dice carries a passing commit-reveal fairness report; the published roll lives in the rejection-sampled unbiased band.
reports.reviewerNotes: Proves the fairness model and invariant well-formedness; the standalone verifier reproduces the chi-square uniformity proof and the modulo-bias negative control.
reports.publicSummary: Provably-fair dice: roll = rejection-sampled H(serverSeed‖clientSeed‖nonce) mod 10000; recomputable from public reveals and verifiably uniform.
